name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: San Francisco's Ria Money Transfer at 2188 Mission St offers fast money transfers and check cashing services.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer at 2188 Mission St in San Francisco, CA is a standalone location serving the local community with money transfer and check cashing services. The Mission District location operates seven days a week, with hours from 8AM to 7:30PM Monday through Saturday, and 8AM to 6PM on Sundays, making it convenient for your banking needs throughout the week.

This San Francisco branch provides domestic and international money transfer services, along with check cashing for various financial instruments. For transfers or inquiries, you can reach the location directly at +1 855-355-2141 during business hours.

If you need quick money transfer or check cashing in San Francisco, bring a valid photo ID. The service is straightforward and designed to process transactions efficiently for residents and visitors in the Bay Area.
pros: Multiple sending methods including WhatsApp, online, mobile app, and in-person options for flexibility
Extensive receiving options (bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM withdrawal) accommodating various preferences
Global reach to 190+ countries across six continents
24-hour availability at 7-Eleven partner locations for time-flexible access
Established agent network including convenient retail partnerships (pharmacies, grocery stores, check cashers)
Mobile app for on-the-go money transfers
Supplementary tools like currency converter and IBAN calculator
cons: Website provides no fee structure, exchange rate information, or transfer speed details for consumer comparison
No visible customer service contact information, complaints resolution process, or satisfaction guarantees on the location page
Limited regulatory or compliance transparency (no mention of licensing, OFAC compliance, or consumer protections)
Agent network appears concentrated in specific urban areas based on example locations; nationwide coverage unclear
No pricing comparison tool or rate quotes available directly from the location finder interface
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending regular remittances to family in other countries
Unbanked and underbanked consumers who prefer cash transactions over bank accounts
Users seeking 24-hour money transfer access through convenient retail locations
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for individuals who regularly send money internationally or domestically and value flexible receiving options and extended hours of operation. The main caveat is that critical financial details—fees, exchange rates, and transfer speeds—are absent from their web presence, requiring direct contact with agents or the company to make informed comparisons with competitors.
services: In-person money transfer at agent locations
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer at 2188 Mission St, San Francisco, CA. Fast money transfers and check cashing.
